---
title: "Day 2: Data Types and Variables"
output: github_document
date: 02-05-2026
---


Today, I have learned about **Variables and Data Types** in R.

## 1. Naming Variables


```{r variable_naming}
user_age <- 28
user_age
.a <- 5 # if a variable starts with . then it's value won't be saved in the environment
.a
```

## 2. The Data Types in R
The four primary types are:


```{r data_types}
# Numeric
my_height <- 1.85

# Integer
my_children <- 2L

# Character
my_name <- "Alex"

# Logical
is_student <- TRUE
```

## 3. Checking Data Types using class() function:

```{r checking_types}
class(my_height)    
class(my_children)  
class(my_name)      
class(is_student)   
```

## 4. Coercion (Converting Data Types into another using as.data_type() function

```{r coercion}
fake <- "500"  

class(fake) 

real_number <- as.numeric(fake)
class(real_number) 

real_number + 10   
```

---
